theme: harbor tugs escorting ships through tidal channels
title: Tug Escort Chains Through the Tide
strategies: fixed round-robin team assignment: cycle through tug ids in listed job order, ignoring geometry and free times entirely
per-ship nearest-tug dispatch: process ships by release time, grab the k geographically nearest tugs regardless of when they actually become free (falls for the straggler trap)

crew-pairing by chaining: group ships by required crew size k, route ONE persistent team through each group in a nearest-neighbour chain, preferring currently-idle tugs when forming a fresh team so a soon-free-but-far tug beats a near-but-still-busy one
(headroom above strong) exact team-routing optimization, e.g. branch-and-bound or ILP over team formation + job sequencing + window choice jointly
